title: Tower Of Gods
description: This datapack adds the Tower of Gods (inspired from zelda wind waker) along with a custom boss: Gohdan (from zelda wind waker). No resource pack
body:
# Tower Of Gods

This datapack adds the Tower of Gods: a dungeon inspired from the tower of gods encountered in Zelda Wind Waker.

**No resource pack required**

## Gohdan (boss of the Tower Of Gods) features
- Can shoot fireballs at you
- Drops arrows regularly
- Loots spectral arrows once killed

![Gohdan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blVRnARy/images/e2d1887ad9fb72434e74d85583a1942d50efa574.png)
